# SkyFunApp

> Meet fellow travelers at airports worldwide. Chat, connect, and make your layover unforgettable with SkyFunApp.

SkyFunApp is a social travel app for iOS, Android, and web that helps travelers connect with others at the same airport or destination.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of SkyFunApp and sign-in.
- [About](/about): What SkyFunApp is and who it's for.
- [Create Account](/create-account): Sign up for a new account.
- [Safety](/safety): Safety guidelines and community rules.
- [Help](/help): Frequently asked questions and support.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of the app.
- [Privacy & Policy](/privacy): How user data is handled.
- [Refund Policy](/refund): Refund terms.
